info.title: cslint
info.description: A fast C# linter that reads rules from .editorconfig. Uses Roslyn syntax-only parsing for fast single-file linting.

options.name: --format
options.description: Output format: text, json, or sarif [default: text]

options.name: --severity
options.description: Minimum severity to report: info, warning, or error [default: info]

options.name: --list-rules
options.description: List all available rules and exit

options.name: --show-config
options.description: Show resolved .editorconfig settings for the given path and exit

options.name: --semantic
options.description: Enable semantic analysis for advanced rules

options.name: --summary
options.description: Show a summary of diagnostics grouped by rule ID

options.name: --rules
options.description: Comma-separated rule IDs to run (e.g., CSLINT266,CSLINT268), or 'all' to enable every rule. Ignores .editorconfig when set.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: One or more paths to C# files or directories to lint
